notes: Two fixes for scenario income/expense modeling: (1) Scenario income & expense one-offs now respect their frequency property. Previously the engine applied them ONLY at the start month even if you set frequency: 'monthly' or 'yearly'. New behavior: 'once' = one-time on month, 'monthly' = every month from start through endMonth (or horizon end), 'yearly' = every 12 months from start through endMonth. Honors endMonth cap. (2) Added 'Recurring income bump' section to custom scenarios (mirror of existing 'Recurring expense bump'). Lets you set a flat monthly income increase with a start month — e.g. salary raise, rental income — without juggling per-month one-off entries. Both new monthlyIncomeStart/Amount and existing monthlyExpenseStart/Amount continue to work alongside individual one-off entries.
